CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Vicki Gross. (212)

Petition For Compromise Of Pending Action For Minor And Notice Of Hearing Thereon
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Text Ruling

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Wing C. Lee, Esq. for Petitioner: Siu Man Tam, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Annie Tam, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $14,250.00
Costs $12,855.16
A net balance of $29,894.84 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of the Orient, Richmond Office, 317 Sixth Ave., San Francisco, CA. 94118, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
